This was a development position working in various capacities within the team. The many hats worn are team lead, architecture member, and developer. Worked exclusively with the Omega team on the production software used by the corporation for paper and pulp.  Accomplishments: ▪ Lead the team developing the Automation and Integration services that handles much of the automation for the production machines.  ▪ Leading the team to also maintain the configuration service, print services, defects, and other development items on the horizon.  ▪ Developed the Blackbox to covert RabbitMq events to strings sent to the TCP ports used by PLCs.  ▪ Developed Event Tool written in .Net Core that allows developers and testers to initiate events for testing purposes. This tool makes use of .Net Core, Angular, Elastic Stack, Reflection, and IL. The tool also takes traces events between services so development and support can trace events between services.  ▪ Worked with the rest of the architecture team to implement usage of the Elastic Stack for logging of the .Net services.  ▪ Writing plugin for Kibana to allow for quicker Elastic Stack searches and exports for defects.  ▪ Working with Architecture Team to create container strategy as well as containers themselves.  ▪ Advise management on directions we should be heading both with regards to personnel, process, and technology.

results.title: Senior Digital Process Engineer | Careerport
highlights: Europe, you’ll partner closely with our sites, sharing expertise, supporting teams on the ground, and delivering impactful change that enhances performance across our network. This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced engineer who thrives at the intersection of technology, data, and manufacturing. Role Responsibilities: Implementing and managing the process engineering deployed digital tools to ensure smooth data integration across facilities and align OT with IT. Using AI tools to assess data patterns and improve maintenance practices, resulting in greater operational reliability. Working with various teams to identify and resolve process issues, using data insights to create practical solutions. Creating and leading training programs for staff on digital tools and data analytics. Setting up performance metrics to measure the success of initiatives and sharing results with leadership. Managing projects aimed at ongoing improvements that follow sound industry practices and make use of technological advances. Actively support sites on deployment of different process engineering digital initiatives by helping them as required. Person Spec: Essential Experience & Skills Strong background in process engineering, ideally within the paper manufacturing industry (or similar complex manufacturing environments) Proven track record of delivering digital improvement initiatives, such as process optimization, automation, or data-driven decision-making Experience with both Operational Technology (OT) and Information Technology (IT), with the ability to bridge the two effectively Familiarity with AI tools, data analytics, and digital platforms to improve efficiency and performance Demonstrated ability to collect, interpret, and apply real-time data to drive operational improvements Strong project management skills, with experience leading commissioning, implementation, or start-up of new technologies Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills, with the ability to influence and gain buy-in across different levels of the business Flexibility to travel across Europe (at least 8 0% of the time) to support site teams, projects, and digital rollouts Desirable Skills & Attributes Previous experience in multi-site project delivery within a European or global business environment Knowledge of lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or continuous improvement methodologies Strong problem-solving mindset with the ability to turn complex data into actionable insights What we can offer you: Competitive salary Qualifying Sick Pay scheme Pension scheme & Life insurance Share Save scheme Income Protection 25 days holiday plus Bank Holidays Employee Assistance Programme Virtual GP, Occupational Health & free Flu vaccine Cycle to Work and shopping discounts We are DS Smith, together with International Paper, we are a global leader in sustainable packaging solutions and other fibre-based products. We believe a better, more sustainable tomorrow is possible with the right people, who challenge and support one another to enact positive change. We employ more than 65,000 colleagues in North America and Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA), who are experts in innovation, manufacturing, design, sales, sustainability, supply chain, and much more. Together with our customers, we make the world safer and more productive, one sustainable packaging solution at a time. Become part of a world-leading organisation and do your best work with us! “To fulfil our purpose of redefining packaging for a changing world, we aim to build a diverse, motivated, and engaged workforce. Our goal is to create a culture of inclusion where everyone is treated fairly, differences are valued, and everyone has an equal opportunity to succeed. Our people come from diverse backgrounds, bring different perspectives, ideas and experiences to generate unique solutions focused on present and future sustainability challenges. We welcome all candidates to apply, even those not

results.title: Cooper Robertson
highlights:
IT Business Analyst & Project Manager at International Paper | Graduate Student in Data Science & AI at Mississippi State University | Driving Safety, Reliability, and Digital Transformation
...
Information Technology Business Analyst at [International Paper](
...
My name is Cooper Robertson. I hold a B.S. in Computer Engineering with a Minor in Spanish from Mississippi State University, where I graduated in May 2024. I also had the opportunity to study Spanish at the University of Alcalá in Alcalá de Henares, Spain. I am currently pursuing graduate studies in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at Mississippi State University. Professionally, I have three years of experience as an Apple Computing Professional and Specialist at Best Buy, and I completed a summer 2023 internship with International Paper in Client Device Management. I now work in IT within International Paper’s Manufacturing and Improve space, focusing on reliability and safety, and overseeing projects and applications that enhance safety and operational efficiency in the manufacturing environment. My passion lies in applying data-driven and AI solutions to improve manufacturing reliability and safety, bridging my engineering background with real-world technological impact.
...

Drive enterprise wide analysis and solution design efforts that support International Paper’s global reliability and safety strategy. Translate complex business and safety requirements into actionable technical specifications, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture, data governance standards, and digital transformation priorities. Collaborate with IT, operations, and vendor partners to validate requirements, assess solution performance, and ensure enhancements deliver measurable operational value. Strengthen organizational decision-making by developing analytics frameworks that improve data quality, visibility, and reliability.

highlights:
Data Scientist - Materials R&D - Remote-Travel | Hirequorum
...
# Data Scientist - Materials R&D - Remote-Travel
...
This position can be based out of Marysville, MI, or work remotely with some travel as needed.
...
Title: Senior Data Scientist
...
Department: Research and Development
...
Position Purpose: The Senior Data Scientist will support R&D efforts in bio-polymers and sustainable materials and focusing on applying advanced data science, statistical modeling, and machine learning to experimental, process, and materials data to accelerate innovation, improve material performance, and reduce development cycles.
...
- Apply machine learning techniques (e.g., regression, classification, clustering, time-series modeling) to complex scientific datasets
...
- Stay current with advances in materials informatics, polymer modeling, and applied AI in scientific research
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Materials Science, Chemical Engineering, or a related field; Master’s or PhD preferred

- 10+ years of professional experience in data science, applied analytics, or scientific computing; experience working with materials science, polymer science or chemical R&D data, preferred
...
- Strong proficiency in Python and/or R for data analysis and modeling
...
- Strong foundation in statistics, experimental design, and multivariate analysis
...
- Demonstrated experience applying machine learning to real-world, noisy scientific or experimental data
...
- Familiarity with bio‑polymers, sustainable materials, or polymer processing, preferred
...
- Experience with DOE software, laboratory data management systems (LIMS), or scientific databases, preferred
...
- Experience deploying models to support R&D decision-making or manufacturing scale-up, preferred
...
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure) and data science lifecycle tools, preferred

# Financial Analyst (PTP Exception Management)
...
Posted Jun 26, 2026
...
Financial Analyst (PTP Exception Management)
...
- The Job You Will Perform:
...
- This Financial Analyst position is responsible for managing and resolving issues at the box plants driven by exceptions in system PTP processes, such as price/quantity discrepancies, timing issues, missing information, etc.
- Collaborate with team members at the plant, corporate and external parties to understand existing exceptions and propose corrective actions.
- Identify process improvement opportunities that reduce the number of exceptions and drive improvements with the plants and other impacting groups.
...
- Review/ analyze key performance measures to determine progress and improvement opportunities.
- Control report review and approval.
- Role will be responsible for the PTP exception management of 8-10 box plants.

- The Skills You Will Bring:
...
- Proficient in Microsoft Office 365, especially Excel, including ability to analyze information and manipulate data.
- Key Competencies: Drives Results, Action Oriented, Communicates Effectively, Customer Focus, Process Management, Policies / Procedures adaptation/implementation, Problem Solving, SAP Systems Knowledge
...
- Comfortable working both independently and as a member of a team
- Minimum 2 years successful plant accounting experience with accounting functions such as accounts payable preferred
...
International Paper (NYSE: IP) is the global leader in sustainable packaging solutions. With company headquarters in Memphis, Tennessee, USA, and EMEA (Europe, Middle East and Africa) headquarters in London, UK, we employ more than 65,000 team members and serve customers around the world with operations in more than 30 countries. Together with our customers, we make the world safer and more productive, one sustainable packaging solution at a time. Net sales for 2024 were $18.6 billion. In 2025, International Paper acquired DS Smith creating an industry leader focused on the attractive and growing North American and EMEA regions. Additional information can be found by visiting internationalpaper.com.

Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.

The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.

Experience with training

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.

...

...

...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...

...

...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
